stemHtml:
What conditions could you expect if a weather forecast for part of Europe reports "atmospheric convergence at low levels"?

Low level wind:

options.a: Backed relative to the isobars on the surface chart, cloud dissipating in the sinking vertical currents, and atmospheric convergence close to the tropopause.
options.b: Backed relative to the isobars on the surface chart, cloud forming in the rising vertical currents, and atmospheric divergence close to the tropopause.
options.c: Veered relative to the isobars on the surface chart, cloud forming in the rising vertical currents, and atmospheric convergence close to the tropopause.
options.d: Veered relative to the isobars on the surface chart, cloud dissipating in the rising vertical currents, and atmospheric divergence close to the tropopause.
